title: Get NIETE approval before expanding to all coaches
description: Present the working CoachConnect automation to NIETE management and get sign-off before Step 5 (opening the platform to other coaches). Required because it involves teacher data and organisational cost.

title: Build the message schedule in Google Sheets
description: Create a Google Sheet with columns for school group, message text, day, and time. This becomes the single source of truth for what gets sent when, and is read by Make.com in Step 2.

title: Get a spare SIM and add it to all 9 school WhatsApp groups
description: Buy a cheap second SIM to use as the dedicated CoachConnect number. Add it to all 9 NIETE school groups so automated messages can be sent safely without risking the personal number.

title: Try Make.com automation with Google Sheet
description: Set up a Make.com scenario that reads from a Google Sheet and sends a WhatsApp message to one school group. This proves the no-code automation works before building the full app.

title: Write message templates for each occasion
description: Draft warm, human-sounding templates for the three core message types: Monday motivation, session reminder (day before), and thank-you follow-up (day after). Store them in the Google Sheet.
